{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/53905346?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xVijay/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xVijay/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xVijay/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xVijay/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/0xVijay", "id": 53905346, "login": "0xVijay", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjUzOTA1MzQ2", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xVijay/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xVijay/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xVijay/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xVijay/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xVijay/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xVijay", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-55689", "cvss": {"score": 6.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-287", "name": "Improper Authentication"}], "description": "## Description

OpenFGA's OIDC authenticator skipped JWT audience (`aud`) validation when no audience was configured.
In deployments where one identity provider issues tokens for multiple services,
a token minted for an unrelated service could authenticate to OpenFGA.

## Preconditions

This applies if the following preconditions are met:

1. You run OpenFGA with `authn.method` set to `oidc`.
2. You configured `authn.oidc.issuer` but did **not** set
   `authn.oidc.audience` (`--authn-oidc-audience` / `OPENFGA_AUTHN_OIDC_AUDIENCE`).

## Fix

Upgrade to OpenFGA 1.18.0 or greater. OpenFGA now refuses to start in `oidc`
mode unless both `authn.oidc.issuer` and `authn.oidc.audience` are set, and the
`aud` claim is always validated.

## Acknowledgements

OpenFGA would like to thank https://github.com/0xVijay for the report.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00301, "percentile": 0.2197}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-hcxc-wf8j-23hv", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T14:35:35Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hcxc-wf8j-23hv", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-hcxc-wf8j-23hv"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-55689"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T14:35:35Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openfga/openfga/security/advisories/GHSA-hcxc-wf8j-23hv", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hcxc-wf8j-23hv"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openfga/openfga/security-advisories/GHSA-hcxc-wf8j-23hv", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openfga/openfga", "summary": "OpenFGA: OIDC audience validation skipped when --authn-oidc-audience is unset", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T14:35:36Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-hcxc-wf8j-23hv", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.18.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/openfga/openfga"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.17.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: OpenFGA: OIDC audience validation skipped when --authn-oidc-audience is unset
